subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, that they may inhale the fragrances of the verses of their Lord, the Almighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من فی السموات و الارضین لیجدن کل نفحات آیات ربهم العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
